spec.expr:
range_sum(
    avg(tariffGrid_value offset -$tariffPriceInterval)
    *
    integrate(
        ((gridPower_value > 0 < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[$tariffPriceInterval:$energySampleInterval] offset -$tariffPriceInterval
    ) / 3600000
)

range_sum(
    avg(tariffFeedIn_value offset -$tariffPriceInterval)
    *
    integrate(
        ((gridPower_value < 0 < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[$tariffPriceInterval:$energySampleInterval] offset -$tariffPriceInterval
    ) / 3600000
)

avg(homePower_value) 
- avg(sum(consumersPower_value{title!="", title !~ "$consumerBlocklist"}) default 0)  
- avg(sum(extPower_value{title!="", title !~ "$extBlocklist"}) default 0)  
- avg(sum(auxPower_value{title!="", title !~ "$auxBlocklist"}) default 0)

avg(homePower_value) 
- avg(sum(consumersPower_value{title!="", title !~ "$consumerBlocklist"}) default 0) 
- avg(sum(extPower_value{title!="", title !~ "$extBlocklist"}) default 0) 
- avg(sum(auxPower_value{title!="", title !~ "$auxBlocklist"}) default 0)

range_last(
    sort_by_label (
        sum by (title)(
            (
                integrate(
                    ((consumersPower_value{title !~ "$consumerBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1d:$energySampleInterval]
                ) / 3600
                or
                integrate(
                    ((extPower_value{title !~ "$extBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1d:$energySampleInterval]
                ) / 3600
                or
                integrate(
                    ((auxPower_value{title !~ "$auxBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1d:$energySampleInterval]
                ) / 3600
            )
        )
    , "title")

    and ON(title) 
    (consumersPower_value{title=~".+"} or extPower_value{title=~".+"} or auxPower_value{title=~".+"})
)

sort_by_label(
    sum by (title)(
        integrate(
            ((consumersPower_value{title !~ "$consumerBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1h:$energySampleInterval]
        ) / 3600
        or
        integrate(
            ((extPower_value{title !~ "$extBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1h:$energySampleInterval]
        ) / 3600
        or
        integrate(
            ((auxPower_value{title !~ "$auxBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1h:$energySampleInterval]
        ) / 3600
    )
, "title")

and ON(title) 
(consumersPower_value{title=~".+"} or extPower_value{title=~".+"} or auxPower_value{title=~".+"})

sort_by_label(
    sum by (loadpoint)(
        integrate(
            ((chargePower_value{loadpoint!="", loadpoint !~ "$loadpointBlocklist"} < $peakPowerLimit) default 0)[1h:$energySampleInterval]
        ) / 3600
    )
, "loadpoint")

spec.name: peakPowerLimit
spec.label: Maximum power limit / W
spec.description: Values exceeding this power limit (W) will be ignored as outliers to ensure data accuracy.

spec.name: loadpointBlocklist
spec.label: Excluded loadpoints
spec.description:
List of loadpoints that should NOT be displayed. This field requires a regular expression and cannot be left empty. If you do not want to filter any entries, you must provide a regex that does not match any existing loadpoint.

Examples:

No entries: ^none$
Filter out 'Garage': ^Garage$
Filter out 'Garage' and 'Parking Spot': ^Garage$|^Parking Spot$
Filter out everything starting with 'foo': ^foo.*$

spec.name: consumerBlocklist
spec.label: Excluded consumer devices
spec.description:
List of consumer devices that should NOT be displayed. This field requires a regular expression and cannot be left empty. If you do not want to filter any devices, you must provide a regex that matches none of the entries.

Examples:

No entries: /^none$/
Filter out 'Ground Floor': /^Ground Floor$/
Filter out 'Ground Floor' and 'First Floor': /^Ground Floor$|^First Floor$/
Filter out everything starting with 'Distributor': /^Distributor.*$/

spec.name: extBlocklist
spec.label: Excluded EXT devices
spec.description:
List of EXT devices that should NOT be displayed. This field requires a regular expression and cannot be left empty. If you do not want to filter any devices, you must provide a regex that matches none of the entries.

Examples:

No entries: /^none$/
Filter out 'Ground Floor': /^Ground Floor$/
Filter out 'Ground Floor' and 'First Floor': /^Ground Floor$|^First Floor$/
Filter out everything starting with 'Distributor': /^Distributor.*$/

spec.name: auxBlocklist
spec.label: Excluded  AUX devices
spec.description:
List of AUX devices that should NOT be displayed. This field requires a regular expression and cannot be left empty. If you do not want to filter any devices, you must provide a regex that matches none of the entries.

Examples:

No entries: /^none$/
Filter out 'Ground Floor': /^Ground Floor$/
Filter out 'Ground Floor' and 'First Floor': /^Ground Floor$|^First Floor$/
Filter out everything starting with 'Distributor': /^Distributor.*$/

spec.name: energySampleInterval
spec.label: Sampling interval
spec.description: Energy calculation sampling interval. Recommended to be at least twice the EVCC polling interval. E.g. a value of 30s would match an EVCC polling interval of 15s.

spec.name: tariffPriceInterval
spec.label: Pricing interval
spec.description: The billing interval determines how often electricity price updates are processed (e.g., every 15 or 60 minutes).
